scenarios.title: Cancelled context stops the topic-mapping loop before issuing the next round of DB calls

gherkin.given: a BookmarksConnector with topicMapper initialised (pool-nil-safe) and 10 RawArtifacts each carrying folder_path metadata and a context that has already been cancelled before the call
gherkin.then: it returns 0 (zero artifacts processed), emits exactly one slog.Warn 'bookmarks topic mapping cancelled mid-loop' with processed=0 and remaining=10, and the topicMapper is NOT called for any artifact

scenarios.title: Cancellation is detected before the very first iteration body runs

gherkin.given: a BookmarksConnector with topicMapper initialised and exactly 1 RawArtifact in the slice and a context that has already been cancelled
gherkin.then: it returns 0 (proving the ctx.Err() check runs BEFORE the iteration body, not AFTER)

scenarios.title: Nil topicMapper path is preserved (no-op when constructor lacks pool)

gherkin.given: a BookmarksConnector built via NewConnector (no pool, so topicMapper is nil) and 2 RawArtifacts in the slice
gherkin.when: mapFolderTopics(ctx, artifacts) is invoked with a live context
gherkin.then: it returns 0 without panic (the nil-topicMapper early-return wins)
